Based on the financial report dashboard, the income and expense visualization charts, and the profit statement, identify the top 5 expense items by amount from each file and compile them into a "Top 5 Expense Items Comparison Table." Then add one bar chart to clearly show the differences among the high-expense items. Finally, combine the table and chart into a new Excel file named `financial-table-key-expense-analysis-concise-version.xlsx`.
[Note] Save all task deliverables to the required location inside the working directory. When you finish, provide the final output file paths as a list. The paths must be relative to the working directory, for example ['model_output/a.xlsx', 'model_output/b.docx'].

/bin/bash -lc "python - <<'PY'
from openpyxl import Workbook
from openpyxl.chart import BarChart, Reference
from openpyxl.styles import Font, PatternFill
from pathlib import Path

out = Path('model_output/financial-table-key-expense-analysis-concise-version.xlsx')
out.parent.mkdir(parents=True, exist_ok=True)

wb = Workbook()
ws = wb.active
ws.title = 'Comparison'

rows = [
    ['Source File', 'Rank', 'Expense Item', 'Amount', 'Note'],
    ['Financial report dashboard', 1, 'SOURCE INACCESSIBLE', None, 'No accessible source files matching the requested dashboard were found in the working directory.'],
    ['Financial report dashboard', 2, 'SOURCE INACCESSIBLE', None, 'Unable to identify top 5 expense items because the source file is missing/inaccessible.'],
    ['Financial report dashboard', 3, 'SOURCE INACCESSIBLE', None, 'Unable to identify top 5 expense items because the source file is missing/inaccessible.'],
    ['Financial report dashboard', 4, 'SOURCE INACCESSIBLE', None, 'Unable to identify top 5 expense items because the source file is missing/inaccessible.'],
    ['Financial report dashboard', 5, 'SOURCE INACCESSIBLE', None, 'Unable to identify top 5 expense items because the source file is missing/inaccessible.'],
    ['Income and expense visualization charts', 1, 'SOURCE INACCESSIBLE', None, 'No accessible source files matching the requested charts were found in the working directory.'],
    ['Income and expense visualization charts', 2, 'SOURCE INACCESSIBLE', None, 'Unable to identify top 5 expense items because the source file is missing/inaccessible.'],
    ['Income and expense visualization charts', 3, 'SOURCE INACCESSIBLE', None, 'Unable to identify top 5 expense items because the source file is missing/inaccessible.'],
    ['Income and expense visualization charts', 4, 'SOURCE INACCESSIBLE', None, 'Unable to identify top 5 expense items because the source file is missing/inaccessible.'],
    ['Income and expense visualization charts', 5, 'SOURCE INACCESSIBLE', None, 'Unable to identify top 5 expense items because the source file is missing/inaccessible.'],
    ['Profit statement', 1, 'SOURCE INACCESSIBLE', None, 'No accessible source files matching the requested profit statement were found in the working directory.'],
    ['Profit statement', 2, 'SOURCE INACCESSIBLE', None, 'Unable to identify top 5 expense items because the source file is missing/inaccessible.'],
    ['Profit statement', 3, 'SOURCE INACCESSIBLE', None, 'Unable to identify top 5 expense items because the source file is missing/inaccessible.'],
    ['Profit statement', 4, 'SOURCE INACCESSIBLE', None, 'Unable to identify top 5 expense items because the source file is missing/inaccessible.'],
    ['Profit statement', 5, 'SOURCE INACCESSIBLE', None, 'Unable to identify top 5 expense items because the source file is missing/inaccessible.'],
]
for r in rows:
    ws.append(r)

for cell in ws[1]:
    cell.font = Font(bold=True)
    cell.fill = PatternFill('solid', fgColor='D9EAF7')

ws.column_dimensions['A'].width = 32
ws.column_dimensions['B'].width = 8
ws.column_dimensions['C'].width = 28
ws.column_dimensions['D'].width = 14
ws.column_dimensions['E'].width = 80

chart_sheet = wb.create_sheet('Chart')
chart_sheet.append(['Expense Item', 'Amount'])
for i in range(1,6):
    chart_sheet.append([f'Unavailable Item {i}', 0])

chart = BarChart()
chart.title = 'High-Expense Items Comparison (Unavailable Source Data)'
chart.y_axis.title = 'Expense Item'
chart.x_axis.title = 'Amount'
chart.height = 8
chart.width = 18

data = Reference(chart_sheet, min_col=2, min_row=1, max_row=6)
cats = Reference(chart_sheet, min_col=1, min_row=2, max_row=6)
chart.add_data(data, titles_from_data=True)
chart.set_categories(cats)
chart_sheet.add_chart(chart, 'D2')
chart_sheet['D20'] = 'Source status: Requested source files were not present or otherwise inaccessible in the working directory.'

wb.save(out)
print(out)
PY"

from openpyxl import Workbook

    ['Profit statement', 3, 'SOURCE INACCESSIBLE', None, 'Unable to identify top 5 expense items because the source file is missing/inaccessible.'],
    ['Profit statement', 4, 'SOURCE INACCESSIBLE', None, 'Unable to identify top 5 expense items because the source file is missing/inaccessible.'],
    ['Profit statement', 5, 'SOURCE INACCESSIBLE', None, 'Unable to identify top 5 expense items because the source file is missing/inaccessible.'],
]
for r in rows:
    ws.append(r)

for cell in ws[1]:
    cell.font = Font(bold=True)
    cell.fill = PatternFill('solid', fgColor='D9EAF7')

ws.column_dimensions['A'].width = 32
ws.column_dimensions['B'].width = 8
ws.column_dimensions['C'].width = 28
ws.column_dimensions['D'].width = 14
ws.column_dimensions['E'].width = 80

chart_sheet = wb.create_sheet('Chart')
chart_sheet.append(['Expense Item', 'Amount'])
for i in range(1,6):
    chart_sheet.append([f'Unavailable Item {i}', 0])

chart = BarChart()
chart.title = 'High-Expense Items Comparison (Unavailable Source Data)'
chart.y_axis.title = 'Expense Item'
chart.x_axis.title = 'Amount'
chart.height = 8
chart.width = 18

data = Reference(chart_sheet, min_col=2, min_row=1, max_row=6)
cats = Reference(chart_sheet, min_col=1, min_row=2, max_row=6)

wb.save(out)
print(out)
